eras.name: Intent
eras.description: The project goal is written down.
eras.narrative_arc: A clear intent appears before code.

eras.name: Prototype
eras.description: The prototype is scaffolded and wired.
eras.narrative_arc: Implementation pressure exposes the first integration gap.

eras.name: Hardening
eras.description: Tests and audit boundaries are added.
eras.narrative_arc: The project shifts from making claims to proving them.
